parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Opsgenie destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise opsgenie:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channels skip Apprise and transform the envelope into a native Opsgenie Alerts API {message} payload delivered straight to api.opsgenie.com.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and " — " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *},"description":{* _escape_json(_body.body or "") *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Opsgenie Alerts API (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Opsgenie destinations, direct

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Opsgenie apikey
